untranslatable_reason: Signal requires CFTC commercial hedger positioning data (net long/short position percentiles and 252-day distribution tracking), which is not available in the allowed indicators list. The core logic of comparing hedger positioning percentiles against trailing distributions, tracking multi-week positioning sustenance, and comparing against 50th percentile thresholds cannot be expressed using only price-based technical indicators. A data feed integration for CFTC Commitments of Traders (CoT) data would be required.
translation_notes: Translated the trend-following component using sma_200 as a proxy for trend direction (price above/below 200-day MA), but the signal's primary mechanism—commercial hedger positioning flows counter to price—cannot be implemented without external CFTC data. The entry conditions specify extreme percentile thresholds (>75th) for hedger net positioning sustained over 2+ weeks, and exits on positioning reversal below 50th percentile, none of which can be derived from available indicators.
